citation: Singapore Code of Advertising Practice — Rule 4.2 (Before/after imagery)
summary: Before/after and transformation images must reflect typical results and must not be misleading through staging or editing.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Before/after photos, split-screen transformations, or retouched results. ACTION: WARN — require typicality disclaimer or substantiation. CHECK: Lighting, makeup, time interval, and digital editing. ESCALATE IF: Dramatic atypical result shown without qualification.
